{{CargoOrgan
|name=Tyrant Turtle Shell
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10952
|idx=145
|description=Heirloom of Yamato Apostle Spike Turtle. Allegedly its great-great-grandfather's lifebound treasure. Tempered by generations of bloodline refinement. Hard as diamond!
|skill=
|hp=814
|def=158
|atk=98
|rush=80
|gene1=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene2=Each round, {race} DEF +20
|gene3=All ELMT RES +10
|gene7=All ELMT RES +30 (Awakened)
|}}
